title: Diced, Snappy Jamaican Andouille-French Tagine
description: A one-pot dish that combines the flavors of Jamaica and France, with a citrusy twist.

ingredients.name: 1 pound Andouille-French sausage, sliced
ingredients.notes: look for a sausage with 30% fat

ingredients.name: 1 large Scotch bonnet pepper, seeded and chopped

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced sausage and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Remove the sausage from the pot and set aside.
Add the diced onions to the pot and cook until they start to brown, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the chopped Scotch bonnet pepper and cook for 1 minute.
Add the cumin, smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper to the pot and stir to combine.
Add the browned sausage back into the pot and stir to combine.
Add the orange juice and orange segments to the pot and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 20 minutes, or until the sauce has thickened and the sausage is cooked through.
Serve the tagine hot, garnished with fresh cilantro if desired.
